title: Cosy Critters & Creepy Crawlies
description: Adds adorable atmospheric animals: birds, bugs, and bothersome creatures.
body:
Adds adorable and abstruse atmospheric animals, accentuating aesthetics.

A client mod. Does not need to be installed on the server.
All effects can be individually disabled or configured: use command `/cosycritters` or the mod list menu.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YatkJsCc11s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Birds
Birds flock together in the sky and occasionally land on blocks, favoring locations high up.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/61PI8Hzj/images/c95a14d31a57d469982556d3af4e08c86aa12342.webp)

Birds will take off and scatter when disturbed by a nearby entity such as a vehicle, mob, or projectile.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/61PI8Hzj/images/4e06f4e46bdc17ec0a688b479b6f53e74def077b.webp)

### Tiny Spiders
Appear from within **cobwebs**, crawling out along the walls, floors, and ceilings.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/61PI8Hzj/images/7b728ac720b3ab13a30c12ffd82ee3b3b2b67e01.gif)

### Moths
Attracted to lights. Will surround any **light emitting block** left exposed to the sky.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/61PI8Hzj/images/aa28f755536effb42c310fd4707a6ec1db5083b4.gif)

### The Hat Man
sleep paralysis demon easter egg - disabled by default
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/61PI8Hzj/images/ee3de6af7284d32c2243a5ec179c9f5b9fa63d31.png)
